Cabbagetown • Atlanta
Milltown Arms Tavern is
Where You Want To Be!
Cabbagetown is a melting pot neighborhood and Milltown Tavern is where everyone comes together over cold beer, tasty hot wings, great conversation, a top-notch juke box and the big game.
